mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wiki_ingest_tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM wiki_ingest_tasks WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_ingest_tasks (source_id, file_name, status, progress, step, total_chunks, operator_id) VALUES (#{sourceId}, #{fileName}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{step}, #{totalChunks}, #{operatorId})
